title: thymus × copiosus subsp. brachychaetus
intro: Thymus × copiosus subsp. brachychaetus is a hybrid plant species, specifically a subspecies of the Thymus × copiosus, known for its aromatic leaves and stems, commonly used in herbal medicine. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Thymus × copiosus subsp. brachychaetus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, essential oils, and infusions, often used to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
